overall.description: Atmospheric game engine footage showing a slow approach to a fog-shrouded coastal lighthouse with a red-roofed outbuilding, surrounded by dense evergreen forest and rocky terrain. The scene features heavy fog, muted desaturated colors, and cinematic lighting typical of narrative-driven games.

events.description: brief sun glare appears through the fog in the sky above the lighthouse

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along the foggy coastal path toward the lighthouse, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall white lighthouse with black horizontal stripes and a metal framework top
small structure with dark red roof situated below the lighthouse
large evergreen tree dominating the right foreground with dense branches
mossy rocks and low vegetation covering the sloped ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy coastal scene with a striped lighthouse visible on the left and a red-roofed building nestled on the rocky hillside. A tall pine tree stands prominently in the right foreground. The camera moves slowly forward through the dense fog, with brief sunlight breaking through the clouds around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal lighthouse approach with utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow approach toward the lighthouse, maintaining steady forward movement

entered.detail: wooden telephone pole with crossbars visible in the background mist

segments.scene_description: The approach continues through the persistent fog as the lighthouse grows slightly larger in the frame. A utility pole becomes visible in the background on the right. The tall pine tree shifts from the immediate foreground to the mid-ground as the camera advances, while the rocky terrain and red-roofed building remain central features.

scene_state.functional_zone: close approach to foggy coastal lighthouse

agents.ego_description: nearing the lighthouse base while moving through the dense coastal fog

entered.detail: thick stand of evergreen trees visible through the fog behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches closest to the lighthouse, which now fills more of the left side of the frame. The tall foreground pine tree passes out of view behind the camera, while the utility pole becomes more prominent on the right. The red-roofed outbuilding remains a constant central landmark as the fog persists throughout the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous forward movement through a dense coastal fog toward a lighthouse and its accompanying red-roofed outbuilding. It begins with a striped lighthouse on the left and a prominent pine tree in the right foreground, as brief bursts of sunlight momentarily break through the heavy clouds. As the camera advances, the pine tree shifts into the mid-ground and a utility pole emerges in the background, while the rocky hillside and red-roofed building remain central landmarks. The scene then closes in on the lighthouse as it fills more of the frame, with the foreground tree passing out of view and the utility pole becoming more prominent on the right. The approach concludes with the camera at its closest point to the structures, all while the persistent fog maintains a muted, atmospheric shroud over the terrain.
